tweets.full_text:
We’ve designed and built our first AI chip: Jalapeño.

Designed from the ground up by OpenAI and brought to production with @Broadcom, Jalapeño is purpose-built for the LLM workloads powering ChatGPT, Codex, the API, and future agentic products.

Chips are foundational to the AI https://t.co/mHU7DaMMTi
tweets.summary: OpenAI与Broadcom联合推出首款自研AI芯片Jalapeño，专为LLM工作负载优化。这是OpenAI从芯片设计到生产的完整自主化举措，标志着AI公司向产业链上游延伸的新趋势。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：OpenAI首款自研芯片

tweets.full_text:
A senior Anthropic engineer just dropped 11-page PDF on "Loop Engineering" for agentic systems.

The shift: you stop prompting the agent. You build the system that prompts it instead.

Schedule → Discover → Build → Verify → Repeat

Every loop runs one turn, five moves:

• https://t.co/yvV0sdZoeP
tweets.summary: Anthropic资深工程师发布《Loop Engineering》11页PDF，提出智能体系统新范式：从人工提示转向系统自动提示。循环流程为Schedule→Discover→Build→Verify→Repeat，每轮五步操作。
viral_signals: 有人物/团队故事：Anthropic资深工程师身份
终于型选题：新范式突破
angles: Anthropic工程师揭秘：智能体新范式Loop Engineering
从人工提示到系统自动提示，智能体架构的范式转移
5步循环系统如何让AI自我迭代：Schedule→Verify→Repeat

tweets.full_text: The users who complain about the flaws in your product may seem annoying, but they are on the whole probably your most valuable users. They complain because they care, and I doubt a startup could ever get really big without users who care a lot about the product.
